title: Fieldwork PR Request
description: Runtime-enforced request shape accepted by fieldwork-pr-broker.

request_id.description: Client-generated UUID used for replay protection and audit correlation.

created_at.description: UTC timestamp for auditability, formatted like 2026-05-11T10:30:00Z.

repo_path.description: Absolute path to an onboarded repo under the Fieldwork projects root. Default shown; the broker derives the real pattern from FIELDWORK_BROKER_PROJECTS_ROOT.

branch.description: PR head branch to push. The broker pushes HEAD to this branch. Default prefix shown; the broker derives the real prefix from FIELDWORK_BROKER_BRANCH_PREFIX.

title.description: Pull request title. Runtime rejects titles over 200 characters or containing newlines.

body.description: Pull request body. Runtime enforces a 64 KiB UTF-8 byte limit and scans with gitleaks.
